core_service: Online payment processing and financial infrastructure for internet businesses.
target_customer: SaaS companies, marketplaces, e-commerce brands, startups, and enterprises that need payments or embedded finance.
probable_pain_point: Managing secure payments, billing, fraud prevention, and global payment methods while scaling across markets.
outreach_opener: Hi Stripe team, I noticed your platform supports businesses that need reliable payments and financial infrastructure. I would love to share a quick idea around improving enrichment for high-intent merchant leads.

core_service: Workflow automation connecting apps and automating business processes.
target_customer: Operations, marketing, sales, support, and product teams that rely on many SaaS tools.
probable_pain_point: Reducing repetitive manual work and keeping customer or operational data synchronized across tools.
outreach_opener: Hi Zapier team, I saw your focus on helping teams automate work across their apps. I would love to share a quick idea for identifying automation-ready accounts from website signals.

core_service: Connected workspace for notes, documents, projects, knowledge bases, and team collaboration.
target_customer: Startups, product teams, knowledge workers, students, and companies that want a flexible collaborative workspace.
probable_pain_point: Keeping knowledge, project work, and documentation organized as teams grow.
outreach_opener: Hi Notion team, I noticed your product helps teams centralize knowledge and workflows. I would love to share how website intelligence can surface teams that are actively restructuring their operations.
